_comment_: Zaude framework config. Install to ~/.zaude/config.json. Remove underscore-prefixed comment keys before use.
_comment_cwd_to_project: Explicit map of cwd-basename → vault-project-slug for projects whose working-directory name doesn't match the vault folder name. Leave {} if your cwd names match your vault folders.
_comment_frozen_zones: List of path substrings Claude must never write to. Used by frozen-guard.py. Example: ['legacy-app', 'production-vendor-dir']. Leave [] to disable.
